_doc: Hermetic retrieval-regression fixture (gbrain v0.40.1-inspired). A small fixed corpus + hand-curated queries with the distinctive phrase the correct claim must contain. test_qrels_regression.py ingests the corpus, runs hybrid retrieval offline, and fails if top-1 accuracy or recall@5 drops below threshold. Edit corpus/qrels to extend coverage; keep markers unique to one claim.
corpus: The production database runs PostgreSQL 16 with pgvector for embeddings.
Authentication uses JWT bearer tokens signed with the RS256 algorithm.
The CI pipeline runs pytest and ruff on every pull request via GitHub Actions.
The frontend is built with React and Vite, styled using Tailwind CSS.
API rate limiting is enforced at 100 requests per minute per key.
Background maintenance jobs are scheduled by a cron daemon every six hours.
Secrets are stored in environment variables and never committed to git.
The vector search backend is Qdrant, queried over HTTP on port 6333.
Application logs are shipped to Grafana Loki for centralized observability.
The mobile client is a React Native app targeting both iOS and Android.
Schema migrations use a versioned framework with sha256 checksum drift detection.
Query result caching uses Redis with a five minute TTL.
